# `fiscal/state_pension_expenditure_inr_crore`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: State pension expenditure (revenue account)  
**One-line**: Annual state-government pension expenditure (revenue account, ₹ Crore) from FY 2004-05 onwards.  
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-15 (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/fiscal/state_pension_expenditure_inr_crore.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/fiscal/state_pension_expenditure_inr_crore.json)

## Definition

Annual state-government pension expenditure (revenue account, ₹ Crore) from FY 2004-05 onwards. Covers retirement and family pensions paid to state-government employees and pre-NPS hires; does NOT include the centrally-sponsored social-pension schemes (IGNOAPS, IGNWPS) or the National Pension System (NPS) contribution flows. Rapidly-growing line item in most state budgets — relevant to fiscal-sustainability and the Old Pension Scheme (OPS) restoration debate.

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2004-04..2024-04 (21 periods)
- **Spatial**: India (states + UTs); 30 entities (30 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 619

## Methodology vintage

RBI Handbook 2024-25 edition

## Notes

Source: RBI Handbook of Statistics on Indian States 2024-25 edition, Table 171. Suffix codes in column headers — '(A)' = Actuals, '(RE)' = Revised Estimates, '(BE)' = Budget Estimates — are stripped at parse time but the underlying revision tier should be considered when comparing FY24/FY25 with earlier years.
